fields.description:
## Why
The coach's move catalog must offer the right remediation. Two dso lessons need moves: pre-existing issues
should become follow-on tickets (pairs with rebar's discovered_from), and change-detector tests must be
DELETED, not re-pinned to new source text.

## What
Add two Pass-4 coach moves (moves.py + code_review_moves): file-follow-on-ticket (subject = the
pre-existing issue; guidance to create a discovered_from ticket) and delete-bad-test (subject = the
change-detector/tautological test; guidance to delete, not re-pin). Deterministic templates; the LLM only
picks the move and names the subject. applies_when gating (specified — the tag vocabulary is closed, so
define the values these key on): file-follow-on-ticket keys on a pre-existing/out-of-scope finding tag;
delete-bad-test keys on a tests-criterion finding tagged change-detector/tautological. Extend the
applies_when tag vocabulary with these values if no existing tag fits, rather than reusing an ill-fitting one.

## Scope
src/rebar/llm/code_review/moves.py and the coach template set; no verdict-path change.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] file-follow-on-ticket and delete-bad-test moves exist with deterministic templates.
- [ ] The applies_when tag values each move keys on are defined explicitly (vocabulary extended if needed)
      and pass subject validation.
- [ ] A change-detector-test finding maps to delete-bad-test, not an 'improve the test' move.
